positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a mystical celestial garden at twilight. The scene features floating geometric islands connected by glowing bioluminescent vines, populated by stylized, mythological fauna like crystalline hummingbirds and gentle winged deer. The primary color palette is deep indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, accented by glowing gold and emerald green. The composition must be highly graphic, with bold, clean silhouettes and a strong central focal point. Use linocut etching style mixed with neo-art nouveau influences for clean lines and high contrast. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Minimalistic text space allowed, but no text. Cinematic lighting, UHD, vector art, highly detailed, centered composition.
negative: low resolution, blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, messy, realistic photo, 3d render, poor detail
